name: Super Buddy Run 2 Crazy City
description: Get ready to start your new racing journey with your friends. Run for your life, but this time with better and faster cars. While saving the lives of partners, passing many obstacles, and enjoying an exciting driving experience. Collect coins to upgrade your car and complete more than 100 levels to increase speed. Have fun!
tags: Action, Adventure, Boy, Boys, Car, Cars, Driving, Fun, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids
